items.prompt: Track A in this course means practice with…
choices: Real UVM with a local simulator and Accellera library
items.explain: Track A is the real UVM track—offline compiles and runs you keep.

items.prompt: Track B browser labs are mainly for…
choices: Concept sketches and quick literacy feedback
items.explain: Track B builds intuition in the browser; full fidelity stays offline.

items.prompt: This course teaches the pyuvm Python framework as its primary path.
items.explain: learn_uvm2017 focuses on SystemVerilog UVM 2017; pyuvm is learn_pyuvm.

items.prompt: A good first rhythm for a lab module is…
choices: Skip the README and only watch video
Browser sketch for the idea, then offline UVM when ready
Only copy code without a checklist
items.explain: Browser first for intuition, then real UVM for fidelity, is the recommended path.
